meta.description: Stoic classification of external things (adiaphora — indifferents). This is a conceptual overview for discovery and evaluation. For full scoring with virtue-relevance weights, use the SageReasoning API.
meta.key_principle: An indifferent has no moral value in itself. Its value depends entirely on whether it is pursued or avoided through virtue.

preferred.description: Things that are 'according to nature' — generally conducive to functioning well as a human being. A sage will choose these over their opposites, all else being equal, but will not sacrifice virtue to obtain them.
preferred.label: Preferred Indifferent (proegmenon adiaphoron)

dispreferred.description: Things that are 'against nature' — generally not conducive to functioning well. A sage will avoid these when possible but will not compromise virtue to escape them.
dispreferred.label: Dispreferred Indifferent (apoproegmenon adiaphoron)

neutral.description: Things that are genuinely neither preferred nor dispreferred — completely without value in any direction.
neutral.label: Neutral Indifferent

indifferents.name: Health
indifferents.description: Physical wellbeing and functioning of the body.

indifferents.name: Life / Continued Existence
indifferents.description: Remaining alive as a rational being capable of virtue.

indifferents.name: Wealth / Material Resources
indifferents.description: Financial resources and material possessions beyond basic needs.

indifferents.name: Reputation / Social Standing
indifferents.description: Being held in good regard by others.

indifferents.name: Pleasure
indifferents.description: Sensory and psychological enjoyment — a natural by-product of virtuous activity, not a goal in itself.

indifferents.name: Knowledge / Education
indifferents.description: Understanding of how the world works; learning and intellectual development.

indifferents.name: Freedom / Autonomy
indifferents.description: External freedom from constraint — physical, political, or social.

indifferents.name: Friendship / Close Relationships
indifferents.description: Bonds of affection and mutual care with others.

indifferents.name: Poverty / Lack of Resources
indifferents.description: Lack of material resources, financial insecurity.

indifferents.name: Dishonour / Bad Reputation
indifferents.description: Being poorly regarded or disrespected by others.

scoring_note: Detailed virtue-relevance scores, sage stances, and common misuse patterns for each indifferent are applied server-side through the SageReasoning API. To see how indifferents factor into a specific action's score, use POST https://sagereasoning.com/api/score
